Financial Stabilisation & Strategic CFO Leadership

When Business Pressure Demands Clarity

When Business Pressure Demands Clarity

Financial instability rarely appears overnight.

It builds gradually — through margin erosion, tightening liquidity, over-expansion, weak reporting visibility, or delayed decisions.

Many business owners recognise the warning signs — but daily operational pressures leave little room to step back and address root causes.

SummitsBridge Consulting provides experienced financial leadership at critical stages of business transition — restoring clarity, strengthening control, and guiding structured decision-making when it matters most.

Our work is discreet, disciplined, and execution-focused.

Our Core Advisory Mandates
01

Financial Stabilisation & Turnaround Advisory

Supporting SMEs across Sri Lanka, the UAE, and the Middle East facing sustained losses, liquidity pressure, bank stress, or operational imbalance.

We intervene at pivotal stages to restore financial clarity, stabilise cash flow, strengthen governance oversight, and realign the business toward sustainable performance.

→ Learn More
02

Fractional CFO & Strategic Financial Advisory

Providing senior financial leadership to growth-stage and mid-sized businesses across Sri Lanka, the UAE, and the GCC.

As financial complexity increases, many businesses require executive-level oversight — without the overhead of a full-time CFO. We deliver board-level financial discipline, risk insight, and forward-looking strategic guidance aligned with your business ambitions.

→ Learn More
03

Outsourced Finance & Accounting Services

Delivering governance-led outsourced finance and accounting services for SMEs across Sri Lanka, the UAE, Saudi Arabia, the GCC, the UK, and Australia.

Our model combines Chartered Accountant-level expertise with clearly defined control frameworks and senior oversight — ensuring reliability, accountability, and continuity. Outsourcing, when designed correctly, strengthens financial infrastructure rather than diluting it.

→ Learn More

Professional. Discreet. Disciplined.

Our Services

Financial Stabilisation & Turnaround Advisory

Businesses facing sustained losses, tightening liquidity, or increasing bank pressure require calm, experienced financial intervention.

Often, owners are working harder than ever — yet profitability declines and cash flow visibility weakens.

SummitsBridge Consulting provides structured financial stabilisation and turnaround advisory services for SMEs and owner-managed businesses navigating operational and financial strain.

We work alongside owners, boards, and lenders to:

  • Restore financial clarity
  • Rebuild liquidity resilience
  • Improve margin visibility
  • Strengthen governance discipline
  • Realign operations toward sustainable performance

Early intervention significantly improves recovery outcomes.

When to Engage a Stabilisation Advisor
  • Recurring operating losses without a credible recovery plan
  • Liquidity stress despite reported profitability
  • Bank overdrafts or loan facilities under pressure
  • Margin erosion due to cost escalation
  • Rapid expansion without adequate financial controls
  • Weak financial reporting or delayed management information
Our Stabilisation Framework
  • Comprehensive financial diagnostics
  • Product-level margin and cost analysis
  • Working capital restructuring
  • Debt restructuring advisory and lender engagement support
  • 3–5 year recovery and performance realignment plans
  • Cash flow modelling and liquidity planning
  • Governance strengthening and reporting discipline

Each engagement is partner-led and supported by qualified finance professionals — ensuring both senior oversight and analytical depth throughout the recovery process.

The objective is clear: stabilise liquidity, restore financial discipline, and return the business to controlled, sustainable growth.

Selected Experience — Sri Lanka

Large Scale Production Business — Liquidity & Margin Recovery

Engaged during a period of sustained monthly losses and acute liquidity pressure.

Cash flow was stabilised, banking facilities restructured, product economics realigned, and working capital discipline restored — returning the business to controlled performance footing.

Highly Leveraged Manufacturing Group — Debt Restructuring & Operational Reset

Developed a structured multi-year recovery plan, supported lender negotiations, re-established governance discipline, and aligned production capacity to realistic demand levels.

Profitability was restored within 15 months with materially reduced financial risk exposure.

Technology & Telecommunications Business — Structural Reset

Identified weak product profitability visibility and fragmented systems oversight.

Implemented cost realignment, performance metrics, and disciplined capital oversight — restoring accountability and stabilising financial performance.

Diversified Family-Owned Conglomerate — Governance Reset & Strategic Exit

Appointed Group CFO to stabilise and prepare a multi-industry conglomerate for divestment following governance breakdown.

Rebuilt financial reporting, restored loss-making entities, institutionalised controls, and supported successful transaction completion.

Stabilisation requires clarity, discipline, and experienced leadership.

Speak with an Experienced Stabilisation Advisor

All initial discussions are treated with complete confidentiality.

Our Services

Fractional CFO Services — Sri Lanka & Middle East

As businesses grow, financial complexity increases — but appointing a full-time CFO is not always practical.

SummitsBridge Consulting provides fractional CFO services delivering senior-level financial leadership without permanent executive overhead.

We provide disciplined oversight aligned with regional commercial realities and long-term strategic direction.

Our Fractional CFO Support Includes
  • Cash flow forecasting and liquidity planning
  • Financial risk diagnostics
  • Board reporting and executive dashboards
  • Budgeting and performance monitoring
  • Cost optimisation frameworks
  • Capital structure advisory
  • Strategic financial modelling for expansion

Fractional CFO engagement strengthens decision-making clarity, improves risk visibility, and enhances financial control during growth or transition.

Who We Support
  • Growth-stage companies in Sri Lanka, the UAE and GCC
  • Owner-managed businesses requiring executive financial oversight
  • Companies preparing for funding, restructuring, or expansion
  • Businesses seeking stronger reporting discipline and governance

Institutional standards combined with practical commercial execution.

Senior Financial Leadership, Without the Overhead

Discuss how a fractional CFO engagement can support your business.

Our Services

Governance-Focused Outsourced Finance Support

Businesses increasingly require outsourced finance solutions that deliver more than transactional processing.

SummitsBridge Consulting provides governance-led outsourced finance and accounting services designed to strengthen reporting reliability, financial control, and operational discipline.

Our model combines senior oversight with a Sri Lanka-based team of fully qualified Chartered Accountants — ensuring technical competence and dependable execution.

A Governance-Led Model

Outsourcing should enhance financial oversight — not weaken it.

Our framework includes:

  • Documented Standard Operating Procedures
  • Segregation of duties in processing and review
  • Defined month-end close discipline
  • Structured management reporting formats
  • Internal control review checklists
  • Audit-ready documentation practices
  • Strict confidentiality protocols

Each engagement is partner-led, ensuring accountability and continuity.

Scope of Services
  • Bookkeeping and general ledger management
  • Accounts payable and receivable oversight
  • Monthly management accounts
  • Budget preparation and variance analysis
  • Cash flow monitoring
  • Financial systems implementation
  • Policy development and internal control frameworks

The focus is not merely processing — but building dependable financial infrastructure that supports informed decision-making.

Build Dependable Financial Infrastructure

Discuss how our governance-led model can support your business.

The Firm

Leadership & Experience

SummitsBridge Consulting was founded by Saliya Jayaweera, a senior finance professional with more than three decades of experience across international banking, corporate finance leadership, board governance, and restructuring advisory.

Following over 20 years in commercial and banking leadership roles across Sri Lanka and the Middle East, he was appointed as a Partner within a Big 4 accounting firm — combining institutional advisory standards with practical commercial execution.

Professional Background
  • Former Partner — Big 4 Accounting Firm
  • Senior Leadership Roles — International Banking Institutions
  • Corporate Finance & Board Governance Experience
  • Financial Stabilisation & Turnaround Advisory
  • Cost Optimisation & Commercial Transformation
  • Regional Experience — Sri Lanka, India, UK, UAE, KSA, Maldives
Advisory Focus

The firm supports businesses in three primary areas:

  • Financial Stabilisation & Turnaround Advisory
  • Fractional CFO & Strategic Financial Advisory
  • Outsourced Finance & Accounting Services

Each engagement is tailored to the size, complexity, and commercial realities of the business.

Our Philosophy

Financial strain is rarely sudden.

It builds quietly — through margin erosion, liquidity gaps, cost escalation, and delayed corrective action.

By the time pressure becomes visible, leadership teams are often reacting rather than directing.

Many business owners sense the warning signs — but operational demands leave little room to redesign the financial foundation.

SummitsBridge Consulting was founded on the belief that disciplined financial architecture, early diagnostics, and experienced executive guidance can restore stability before instability becomes crisis.

We exist to embed clarity, control, and senior financial leadership at pivotal moments — whether during performance pressure, restructuring, or growth.

— Saliya Jayaweera, Founder
